issue.title: The element_type definition of scaled_accessor and conjugated_accessor are not quite right

discussion.p: The scaled_accessor defines element_type as const decltype(declval<ScalingFactor>() * ...), but its access returns (scaling_factor() * ...), where scaling_factor() returns const ScalingFactor&.
Furthermore, both scaled_accessor and conjugated_accessor's access construct NestedAccessor::element_type via nested-accessor.access(p, i), but this may not be well-formed.
